subject: A mustachioed male figure with arms crossed in a layered green coat with gold epaulettes — Cid from Final Fantasy Legends
description: A stocky male figure stands confidently with arms folded across his chest, shown in mid-shot against a light neutral background. He wears a layered long green coat over a patterned inner garment, prominent gold epaulettes on the shoulders, and dangling earrings. His dark hair is slicked back and he sports a thick dark mustache. Behind him, a large ghost-image of his face dominates the upper background — a common FFTCG dual-layer art treatment. His expression is stern and self-assured. The anime style is clear and the card notes Final Fantasy Legends as the source game.
foreground: Mustachioed man in green coat with gold epaulettes, arms crossed
background: Light cream/ivory with a faded large-face ghost-image of the same figure
emotion: stern, self-assured — arms folded in authority
